title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup present if Charge Case is on outdated FW
scenario: "Case Update Needed" card on Home Screen is dismissable and does not reappear after app restart when earbuds firmware is updated via app but case firmware remains outdated
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds and charge case are on outdated firmware.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
3. Update the earbuds firmware via the app.
4. Observe the Home screen after the update completes.
5. Tap on the "Case Update Needed" card to dismiss it.
6. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the Home screen after restarting the app.
expected: After updating the earbuds, a "Case Update Needed" card appears on the Home screen informing the user that case updates must be done via Poly Lens Desktop app. Tapping the card dismisses it, and it does not reappear after restarting the app.
